'''âj-ng-ng''' ('''kajangang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whee|whee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whee|whee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ng-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajangang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangang|thijangang]] || [[word:jijangang|jijangang]] || [[word:shijangang|shijangang]] || [[word:kijangang|kijangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujangang|thuthujangang]] || [[word:jujujangang|jujujangang]] || [[word:shushujangang|shushujangang]] || [[word:kukujangang|kukujangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujangang|thujangang]] || [[word:jujangang|jujangang]] || [[word:shujangang|shujangang]] || [[word:kujangang|kujangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujangang|thujangang]] || [[word:jujangang|jujangang]] || [[word:shujangang|shujangang]] || [[word:kujangang|kujangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejangang|thejangang]] || [[word:jejangang|jejangang]] || [[word:shejangang|shejangang]] || [[word:kejangang|kejangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojangang|thothojangang]] || [[word:jojojangang|jojojangang]] || [[word:shoshojangang|shoshojangang]] || [[word:kokojangang|kokojangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojangang|thojangang]] || [[word:jojangang|jojangang]] || [[word:shojangang|shojangang]] || [[word:kojangang|kojangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangang|thojangang]] || [[word:jojangang|jojangang]] || [[word:shojangang|shojangang]] || [[word:kojangang|kojangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjangang|thĂŠjangang]] || [[word:jĂŠjangang|jĂŠjangang]] || [[word:shĂŠjangang|shĂŠjangang]] || [[word:kĂŠjangang|kĂŠjangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajangang|thathajangang]] || [[word:jajajangang|jajajangang]] || [[word:shashajangang|shashajangang]] || [[word:kakajangang|kakajangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajangang|thajangang]] || [[word:jajangang|jajangang]] || [[word:shajangang|shajangang]] || [[word:kajangang|kajangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajangang|thajangang]] || [[word:jajangang|jajangang]] || [[word:shajangang|shajangang]] || [[word:kajangang|kajangang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajangang|shajangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajangang|goshajangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajangang|gokishajangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajangangnĂŒ|shajangangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajangangnknĂŒ|goshajangangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangangnĂŒ|gokishajangangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajangangshĂ«|shajangangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajangangnkshĂ«|goshajangangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajangangshĂ«|gokishajangangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangangro|shajangangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangangnkro|goshajangangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangangro|gokishajangangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangangmu|shajangangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangangnkmu|goshajangangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangangmu|gokishajangangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajangangsher|shajangangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajangangnksher|goshajangangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajangangsher|gokishajangangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajangang|shajangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajangangnkng|goshajangangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajangang|gokishajangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajangangya|shajangangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajangangnkya|goshajangangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajangangya|gokishajangangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajangangyam|shajangangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajangangnkyam|goshajangangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajangangyam|gokishajangangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangangnĂŒshĂ«|shajangangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajangangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajangangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangangnĂŒro|shajangangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangangnknĂŒro|goshajangangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangangnĂŒro|gokishajangangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangangnĂŒmu|shajangangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangangnknĂŒmu|goshajangangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangangnĂŒmu|gokishajangangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangangshĂ«nĂŒ|shajangangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajangangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajangangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangangshĂ«ro|shajangangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangangnkshĂ«ro|goshajangangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangangshĂ«ro|gokishajangangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangangshĂ«mu|shajangangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangangnkshĂ«mu|goshajangangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangangshĂ«mu|gokishajangangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangangronĂŒ|shajangangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangangnkronĂŒ|goshajangangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangangronĂŒ|gokishajangangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangangroshĂ«|shajangangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangangnkroshĂ«|goshajangangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangangroshĂ«|gokishajangangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajangangromu|shajangangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajangangnkromu|goshajangangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajangangromu|gokishajangangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajangangmunĂŒ|shajangangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajangangnkmunĂŒ|goshajangangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajangangmunĂŒ|gokishajangangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajangangmushĂ«|shajangangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajangangnkmushĂ«|goshajangangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajangangmushĂ«|gokishajangangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajangangmuro|shajangangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajangangnkmuro|goshajangangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajangangmuro|gokishajangangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
